name: vault.docker.provider.demo
description: Starts Vault in Docker and manages secrets with native SECRET_PROVIDER_VAULT operations.

tasks.name: start.vault.dev
tasks.description: Start a local Vault dev container in Docker and expose port 8200.
tasks.name: flowk-vault-dev
wait.vault
tasks.description: Wait a few seconds to allow Vault startup to complete.

tasks.name: vault.health
tasks.description: Check Vault health status using native HTTP integration.

tasks.name: vault.seed
tasks.description: Write a demo token into Vault KV v2 at path apps/demo.

tasks.name: vault.get
tasks.description: Read the same KV secret via KV_GET.

tasks.name: vault.list
tasks.description: List keys below the apps prefix with KV_LIST.

tasks.name: assert.placeholder
tasks.description: Resolve the Vault placeholder and assert the expected value with native EVALUATE.

else.exit: Vault placeholder did not resolve to the expected value

tasks.name: vault.delete
tasks.description: Delete apps/demo including metadata and all versions.

tasks.name: remove.vault.dev
tasks.description: Remove the Vault dev container after execution.
